title: Stranded Trader
description: A merchant's rig sits dead in the cracked salt-flat, one wheel buried. He squints at you over a dust-caked scarf, hand never far from his holster.

options.text: Help dig the rig free (he pays you +40 gold)
options.result: Hours of shoveling later the rig lurches loose. He counts forty into your palm and rolls off into the haze.

options.text: [Charm 5] Sweet-talk a parting gift from his crate
options.result: Your easy smile wins him over. He digs out a Lucky Cog and presses it into your hand for the company.

options.text: [Luck] Roll his weighted dice for the strongbox
options.result_success: The bones come up sevens. He grumbles and tosses you the core from the strongbox.
options.result_fail: Snake eyes. He laughs, draws iron, and clips your shoulder before you back off.
